title: calamagrostis pilosula var. ciliata
intro: Calamagrostis pilosula var. ciliata, also known as tufted fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Calamagrostis pilosula var. ciliata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
